panels.title: System Health

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, health_score AS "Health" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Summarizes the current health of the greenhouse system.

panels.title: Temp

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

panels.title: VPD

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, vpd_avg AS "VPD" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows vapor pressure deficit, one of the most important plant-stress metrics.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, state AS "State" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows the current controller or equipment state for this subsystem.

panels.title: Cost

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, cost_total AS "Cost" FROM v_cost_today

panels.description: Shows current or recent operating cost for this subsystem.

panels.title: DLI

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, dli_today AS "DLI" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows daily light integral, the accumulated plant light for the day.

panels.title: Alerts

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, open_alerts AS "Alerts" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.description: Shows current or recent alerts that need attention.

panels.title: State

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "value"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current controller or equipment state for this subsystem.

panels.title: Avg Temp

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current or recent average greenhouse temperature.

panels.title: Avg VPD

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current or recent average greenhouse vapor pressure deficit.

panels.title: Outdoor Temp

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Temp"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows outdoor reference conditions that influence greenhouse behavior.

panels.title: Outdoor RH

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_rh_pct AS "Outdoor RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows outdoor reference conditions that influence greenhouse behavior.

panels.title: CO2

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), co2_ppm AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND co2_ppm IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows carbon dioxide conditions in the greenhouse.

panels.title: Water Today

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), water_total_gal AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Gallons used today

panels.title: Current Status

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "State"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'greenhouse_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the current greenhouse operating state at a glance.

panels.title: Zone Temperatures

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), temp_north AS "North"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_north IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_south AS "South"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_south IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_east AS "East"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_east IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_west AS "West"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), temp_avg AS "Average"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows temperature across the main greenhouse zones.

panels.title: Zone VPD

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_north AS "North"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_north IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_south AS "South"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_south IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_east AS "East"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_east IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_west AS "West"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_west IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vpd_avg AS "Average"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "mister_engage_kpa" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'mister_engage_kpa' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows VPD across the main greenhouse zones.

panels.title: Zone Humidity

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), rh_north AS "North RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_north IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), rh_south AS "South RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_south IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), rh_east AS "East RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_east IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), rh_west AS "West RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_west IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), rh_case AS "Case RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_case IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), rh_avg AS "Avg RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND rh_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_rh_pct AS "Outdoor RH"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows relative humidity across the main greenhouse zones.

panels.title: Mister & Fog Activity

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fog"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister South"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister West"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Water Flowing"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'water_flowing' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows recent humidity-control equipment activity.

panels.title: Fog VPD Delta

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(es.ts),
  (SELECT c2.vpd_avg FROM climate c2 WHERE c2.ts <= es.ts ORDER BY c2.ts DESC LIMIT 1)
  - (SELECT c3.vpd_avg FROM climate c3 WHERE c3.ts <= es.ts - interval '5 minutes' ORDER BY c3.ts DESC LIMIT 1)
  AS "VPD Change During Fog"
FROM equipment_state es
WHERE es.equipment = 'fog' AND es.state = false AND $__timeFilter(es.ts)
ORDER BY es.ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD Target" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows the change in VPD associated with fog operation.

panels.title: Mister State

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "value"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'mister_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: 0=Off, 1=S2 (single zone), 2=S3 (all zones)

panels.title: Selected Zone

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "value"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'mister_zone' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows the currently selected zone context for the dashboard controls.

panels.title: Mister Water

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), mister_water_today AS "value"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND mister_water_today IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Gallons used by mister today

panels.title: Budget Exceeded

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS "value"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_budget_exceeded' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Shows whether the current misting water budget has been exceeded.

panels.title: Mister Zone Runtime

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_south_h)::numeric, 2) AS "South"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_west_h)::numeric, 2) AS "West"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_mister_center_h)::numeric, 2) AS "Center"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Shows runtime totals for the misting zones.

panels.title: Mister State & Water

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Mister State"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'mister_state' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), mister_water_today AS "Water Today (gal)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND mister_water_today IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows mister state alongside water-use context.

panels.title: Water Usage (gal)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), water_total_gal AS "Water Total (gal)" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND water_total_gal IS NOT NULL AND ts > '2026-03-10' ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), mister_water_today AS "Mister Water (gal)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND mister_water_today IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows total water used over the selected period.

panels.title: Daily Water Use (Gallons)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(day), used_gal AS "Gallons" FROM v_water_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day) AND day > '2026-03-10' ORDER BY day

panels.description: Shows day-by-day water consumption.

panels.title: Water Efficiency (gal/mol)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(date::timestamptz), gal_per_mol_dli AS "gal/mol"
FROM v_water_efficiency
WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))
ORDER BY date

panels.description: Shows water used relative to delivered plant light, a rough efficiency proxy.

panels.title: Runtime (hours)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan1_min)::numeric/60, 1) AS "Fan 1"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fan2_min)::numeric/60, 1) AS "Fan 2"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_heat1_min)::numeric/60, 1) AS "Heat 1"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_heat2_min)::numeric/60, 1) AS "Heat 2"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_fog_min)::numeric/60, 1) AS "Fog"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(SUM(runtime_vent_min)::numeric/60, 1) AS "Vent"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Shows accumulated equipment runtime in hours.

panels.title: Cycles

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_fan1) AS "Fan1"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_fan2) AS "Fan2"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_heat1) AS "Heat1"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_heat2) AS "Heat2"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_fog) AS "Fog"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_vent) AS "Vent"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_dehum) AS "Dehum"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

SELECT now() AS time, SUM(cycles_safety_dehum) AS "Safety Dehum"
FROM daily_summary WHERE $__timeFilter((date::timestamptz + interval '12 hours'))

panels.description: Shows equipment cycle counts over the selected period.

panels.title: Equipment Timeline

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Heat 1"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Heat 2"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fan 1"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fan 2"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fog"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Vent"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'vent' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister South"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister West"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light Main"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Grow Light Grow"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_grow' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Wall"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_wall' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Water Flowing"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'water_flowing' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows when major equipment was active over time.

panels.title: Stress Summary

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, fn_stress_summary() AS "Stress Summary"

panels.description: Summarizes the main plant-stress conditions observed in the selected period.

panels.title: VPD Stress Hrs

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows hours spent above the configured VPD stress threshold.

panels.title: Zone Temp Delta

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), ROUND((temp_north - temp_south)::numeric, 2) AS "Zone Temp Delta"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND temp_north IS NOT NULL AND temp_south IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Max difference between zone temperatures

panels.title: Relay Status

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, CASE WHEN (SELECT count(*) FROM v_relay_stuck WHERE is_stuck) > 0 THEN 'STUCK' ELSE 'OK' END AS "Relay Status"

panels.description: Shows the current state of relay-controlled devices.

panels.title: Stress Hours

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "VPD Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'vpd_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint Low" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_low' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "Setpoint High" FROM setpoint_changes WHERE parameter = 'temp_high' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows accumulated stress hours across the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), uptime_s AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND uptime_s IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), heap_bytes AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND heap_bytes IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), wifi_rssi AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wifi_rssi IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "SNTP"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'sntp_status' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), probe_health AS "value"
FROM diagnostics
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND probe_health IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "value"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'lead_fan' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), value AS "value"
FROM system_state
WHERE entity = 'last_transition' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Leak"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'leak_detected' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Wind (Speed, Gust, Lull)
panels.description: Tempest weather station wind readings

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), wind_speed_mph AS "Speed"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_speed_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), wind_gust_mph AS "Gust"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_gust_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), wind_lull_mph AS "Lull"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wind_lull_mph IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Conditions (Feels Like, Wet Bulb, UV)
panels.description: Derived outdoor conditions from Tempest

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), feels_like_f AS "Feels Like"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND feels_like_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), wet_bulb_temp_f AS "Wet Bulb"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wet_bulb_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), uv_index AS "UV Index"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND uv_index IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Precipitation, Lightning & Atmosphere
panels.description: Precipitation rate, lightning activity, pressure, vapor pressure, air density

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), precip_in AS "Precip (in)"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND precip_in IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), lightning_count AS "Lightning"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND lightning_count IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), vapor_pressure_inhg AS "Vapor Pressure"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND vapor_pressure_inhg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), air_density_kg_m3 AS "Air Density"
FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND air_density_kg_m3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Config Switches

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Economiser"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'economiser_enabled' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fog Closes Vent"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fog_closes_vent' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Irrigation"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'irrigation_enabled' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Irrig. Wall"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'irrigation_wall_enabled' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Irrig. Center"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'irrigation_center_enabled' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Weather Skip"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'irrigation_weather_skip' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows the current state of the main controller configuration switches.

panels.title: Fertilizer Valves

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Fert Master"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'fert_master_valve' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Wall Fert"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_wall_fert' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Drip Center Fert"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'drip_center_fert' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister South Fert"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_south_fert' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS "Mister West Fert"
FROM equipment_state
WHERE equipment = 'mister_west_fert' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

panels.description: Shows the current state of the fertilizer delivery valves.

panels.title: CO₂ Concentration (ppm)
panels.description: Indoor CO₂ from ESP32 ADC sensor (GPIO36). Normal outdoor is ~420 ppm. Elevated levels indicate plant respiration or poor ventilation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__time(ts), co2_ppm AS "CO₂ (ppm)"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND co2_ppm IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Mister Effectiveness (24h)

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(on_ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'HH:MI AM') AS time, equipment, duration_s, vpd_before, vpd_after, vpd_delta, outdoor_temp_f FROM v_mister_effectiveness WHERE on_ts > now() - interval '24 hours' ORDER BY on_ts DESC LIMIT 15

panels.description: Shows how much VPD reduction each mister zone achieved over the last 24 hours.
